block_02: We would like to take a moment to highlight important changes to IQ Option’s trading schedule during the  upcoming Easter holiday period.
block_03: For your convenience, changes to the trading schedule are highlighted below.
block_28: Note: Binary and Digital Options markets will operate as usual. Depending on market conditions, Over the Counter (OTC) assets may become available for trading.
block_29: Note: The FX Options market will open as usual, but may close early depending on market conditions.
block_30: Should you have any questions, do not hesitate to get in touch with our Support team.
